route: CrowdGen by Appen - Linguistics Experts in the US
value_signal: Official page says the project pays $25/hour for U.S.-based speech annotation and transcription work.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Must reside in the United States and truthfully have native or near-native US English plus transcription or linguistics background.
deadline_or_currentness: Current public page is live; onboarding is rolling and earlier applications are encouraged.
evidence_gate: Approved account plus completed transcription task and verified payout or other usable value.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a truthful fit note only if the user really has linguistics, phonetics, or transcription experience.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must apply and, if selected, complete the project onboarding and tasks.
automation_boundary: No login, application submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The pay is real, but no selection, task assignment, or payout has been verified.
suggested_next_check: Only route this if the user truly has the specialist background and wants the higher-rate transcript lane.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after approved account or visible usable payout delivery.
